summary: Food Priority Delivery System Testing Complete. Backend APIs working correctly - is_locked logic is properly implemented. However, CRITICAL FRONTEND ISSUE: Frontend uses /api/delivery/my-orders which does NOT include is_locked field, while the lock logic is in /api/delivery/my-product-orders. MyOrdersList.js does not handle is_locked property.

critical.issue: Frontend uses /api/delivery/my-orders endpoint which does NOT include is_locked field. The lock logic is in /api/delivery/my-product-orders endpoint. This is a BACKEND-FRONTEND MISMATCH.
Component does NOT handle is_locked property at all. Locked orders should be displayed as grayed out with lock message, but this is not implemented.

integration_issues.issue: Even if is_locked is returned, the frontend component doesn't render locked state - no visual indication that product orders are locked when driver has active food orders

action_items: OPTION 1 (Recommended): Update frontend to use /api/delivery/my-product-orders instead of /api/delivery/my-orders for product order listing
OPTION 2: Add is_locked field to /api/delivery/my-orders endpoint
Update MyOrdersList.js to handle is_locked property - show locked orders with gray background, Lock icon, and lock_reason message
When is_locked=true, disable 'تأكيد التسليم' (Confirm Delivery) button and show lock message
critical_code_review_comments: Backend /api/orders/{order_id}/delivery/delivered (lines 876-892) correctly blocks delivery with 403 when active food orders exist
Backend /api/delivery/available-orders (lines 426-501) correctly hides product orders when driver has active food orders
Frontend DeliveryHomePage.js line 62 uses /api/delivery/my-orders - needs to switch to my-product-orders
Frontend DeliveryPages.js line 490 uses /api/delivery/my-orders - needs to switch to my-product-orders
MyOrdersList.js line 4 imports Lock icon but never uses it for locked orders
seed_data_creation: None - Used existing test data. Driver has 3 active food orders and 4 product orders for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Food Priority Delivery System: Backend is 100% working. Frontend needs to be updated to: 1) Use /api/delivery/my-product-orders endpoint, 2) Handle is_locked property in MyOrdersList.js. Current state: Driver 0900000000 has 3 active food orders (out_for_delivery) and 4 product orders (3 picked_up, 1 out_for_delivery). All product orders are correctly locked in backend.

GET_my_product_orders_is_locked.verification: Returns is_locked: true when driver has active food orders, with lock_message and active_food_orders count

PUT_delivery_delivered_protection.verification: Returns 403 with Arabic message when driver tries to deliver product while having active food orders

GET_available_orders_filtering.verification: Hides shop/product orders when driver has active food orders, only shows food orders

frontend_lock_display.issue: Component doesn't use is_locked field, doesn't show locked state visually

response_sample.lock_message: لديك 3 طلب طعام نشط. أكمل توصيل الطعام أولاً ثم يمكنك تسليم المنتجات

delivery_blocked_response.detail: لديك 3 طلب طعام نشط. أكمل توصيل الطعام أولاً ثم يمكنك تسليم المنتجات

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Backend-Frontend endpoint mismatch. Backend has lock logic in /api/delivery/my-product-orders but frontend uses /api/delivery/my-orders which lacks this feature.
reproduction_steps: 4. But frontend uses /api/delivery/my-orders which has no is_locked field
5. MyOrdersList.js doesn't check for is_locked, so locked orders appear normal
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Update frontend to use correct endpoint and add is_locked handling to MyOrdersList.js
